common.openLinkInBrowser: If you prefer to open this link in a different browser, copy and paste the URL below:

footer.tagline: AI-powered process audit and risk intelligence.
footer.receivingBecauseAccount: You are receiving this email because you have an Auditora.ai account.
footer.receivingBecauseTool: You are receiving this email because you used a free tool on Auditora.ai.
footer.receivingBecauseInvite: You are receiving this email because someone invited you to Auditora.ai.
footer.aiDisclaimer: AI-generated analyses are informational only and should be reviewed by qualified professionals before making decisions.

emailVerification.subject: Verify your new email — Auditora.ai
emailVerification.body: You requested to change your email address. Please verify this new address by clicking the button below.

forgotPassword.subject: Reset your Auditora.ai password
forgotPassword.preheader: Follow this link to set a new password
forgotPassword.body:
We received a request to reset the password for your Auditora.ai account. Click the button below to set a new password.

If you did not make this request, you can safely ignore this email.

magicLink.subject: Sign in to Auditora.ai
magicLink.preheader: Your secure sign-in link is ready
magicLink.body: You requested a sign-in link for your Auditora.ai account. Click the button below to sign in securely.

newUser.subject: Verify your Auditora.ai account
newUser.body: Welcome to Auditora.ai. To complete your registration, please verify your email address using the code below or by clicking the button.

organizationInvitation.subject: Join {organizationName} on Auditora.ai
organizationInvitation.headline: Join {organizationName} on Auditora.ai
organizationInvitation.body: You have been invited to join {organizationName} on Auditora.ai. Click the button below to accept the invitation and access the workspace.

toolResult.subject: Your {toolName} result is ready — Auditora.ai
toolResult.preheader: Your {toolName} analysis is ready to review
toolResult.heading: Your {toolName} result is ready
toolResult.body: Thank you for using Auditora.ai. Your {toolName} analysis has been generated and is ready to review.
toolResult.didYouKnow: Auditora.ai can generate BPMN diagrams, SIPOC, RACI matrices, and process audits live during your video calls. The AI joins your meeting and builds everything automatically.

toolNurture1.subject: What if {toolName} ran during your meetings?
toolNurture1.preheader: See how Auditora.ai automates process documentation
toolNurture1.heading: Now imagine this during your meeting
toolNurture1.intro: A few days ago you used our free {toolName}. You described a process and got results in seconds.
toolNurture1.hook: What if that happened automatically during your stakeholder interview?
toolNurture1.description: With Auditora.ai, an AI assistant joins your Zoom, Teams, or Meet call and:
toolNurture1.feature1: Guides your questions with a BPM teleprompter (SIPOC + gap analysis)
toolNurture1.feature2: Transcribes the conversation in real-time with speaker diarization
toolNurture1.feature3: Extracts process steps, roles, and decisions automatically
toolNurture1.feature4: Builds the BPMN diagram live while you talk
toolNurture1.feature5: Generates a complete deliverable package when you finish
toolNurture1.result: 1 hour meeting = complete BPMN + RACI + process sheet + executive summary. No post-session documentation work.

toolNurture2.subject: Save 16+ hours/month on process documentation
toolNurture2.preheader: How BPM consultants eliminate post-session work
toolNurture2.heading: How a BPM consultant saves 3+ hours per session
toolNurture2.intro: Last week you used our {toolName}. Here is what a typical Auditora.ai session looks like in practice:
toolNurture2.beforeDetail: 1 hour meeting + 4-6 hours documenting (BPMN, RACI, process sheet, executive summary)
toolNurture2.afterDetail: 1 hour meeting + 15 minutes reviewing AI-generated deliverables
toolNurture2.math: The math: 4 sessions/month x 4 hours saved = 16 hours/month you get back for analysis and client work instead of documentation.

sessionRecap.subject: Deliverables ready: {processName} — Auditora.ai
sessionRecap.preheader: Your session deliverables for {processName} are ready to review
sessionRecap.heading: Your session deliverables are ready
sessionRecap.body: The deliverables for your {processName} session have been generated and are ready for review.

onboardingSteps.subject: Get started with Auditora.ai in 3 steps
onboardingSteps.preheader: Your first AI-powered process session awaits
onboardingSteps.heading: Get started with Auditora.ai
onboardingSteps.body: Your account is set up. Here is how to run your first AI-powered process elicitation session:
onboardingSteps.step1Body: Open your dashboard and create a new session. Define the process scope and invite participants.
onboardingSteps.step2Title: 2. Invite the AI to your call
onboardingSteps.step2Body: When your meeting starts, Auditora.ai joins your Zoom, Teams, or Meet call automatically. It listens, guides, and documents.
onboardingSteps.step3Body: After the meeting, your BPMN diagram, SIPOC, RACI, risk analysis, and executive summary are ready for review.
onboardingSteps.valueProp: Each session saves 3-5 hours of documentation work.

trialExpiring.subject: Your Auditora.ai trial ends in {daysRemaining} days
trialExpiring.preheader: Upgrade now to keep your AI-powered process sessions
trialExpiring.heading: Your trial ends in {daysRemaining} days
trialExpiring.body: Your {planName} trial on Auditora.ai is about to expire. After the trial ends, you will lose access to AI-powered session recording, live BPMN generation, and automated deliverable creation.
trialExpiring.valueProp: Teams using Auditora.ai save an average of 16+ hours per month on process documentation.
trialExpiring.questionsNote: Have questions? Reply to this email and our team will help you find the right plan.

reEngagement.subject: Your next process session is waiting
reEngagement.preheader: Pick up where you left off on Auditora.ai
reEngagement.heading: Your next process session is waiting
reEngagement.body: It has been a while since your last session on Auditora.ai. Your team's process documentation and risk identification work is most effective with regular AI-assisted sessions.
reEngagement.suggestion: Start a new session today and let the AI handle the documentation while you focus on the conversation.

contactConfirmation.subject: We received your message — Auditora.ai
contactConfirmation.preheader: Thanks for reaching out, we will get back to you soon
contactConfirmation.heading: We received your message
contactConfirmation.body: Hi {name}, thanks for contacting us. We have received your message and our team will get back to you shortly.
contactConfirmation.note: We typically respond within 24 hours on business days.

sessionInvitation.subject: Session preparation: {processName} — Auditora.ai
sessionInvitation.preheader: You are invited to a process session for {processName}
sessionInvitation.yourPreparation: How to prepare for your role
sessionInvitation.questionsHeading: Please reflect on these questions before the session
sessionInvitation.intakeDescription: Please fill out this short form before the session so we can make the best use of our time together.

upgradeInvitation.subject: Unlock more with Auditora.ai {suggestedPlan}
upgradeInvitation.preheader: Get more sessions, users, and features with {suggestedPlan}
upgradeInvitation.heading: Unlock more with {suggestedPlan}
upgradeInvitation.body: You are currently on the {currentPlan} plan. Upgrade to {suggestedPlan} to unlock:
